name: Decanter of Endless Water
overview: A stoppered flask that produces fresh or salt water using command words.

properties.physical_description: This stoppered flask sloshes when shaken, as if it contains water. The decanter weighs 2 pounds.
properties.activation: You can take a Magic action to remove the stopper and issue one of three command words, whereupon an amount of fresh water or salt water (your choice) pours out of the flask
properties.duration: The water stops pouring out at the start of your next turn

command_words.effect: The decanter produces 1 gallon of water
The decanter produces 5 gallons of water
The decanter produces 30 gallons of water that gushes forth in a Line 30 feet long and 1 foot wide

geyser_effect.aiming: If you're holding the decanter, you can aim the geyser in one direction (no action required)
geyser_effect.creature_target: One creature of your choice in the Line must succeed on a DC 13 Strength saving throw or take 1d4 Bludgeoning damage and have the Prone condition
geyser_effect.object_target: Instead of a creature, you can target one object in the Line that isn't being worn or carried and that weighs no more than 200 pounds. The object is knocked over by the geyser
